login.ssoIntro: This application uses Single Sign-On for authentication.
login.demoModeBody: Credentials are pre-filled. All data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.
login.noAuthMethods: No authentication methods are configured. Please contact the administrator.
login.welcomeDemo: Welcome to Monize Demo! Data resets daily at 4:00 AM UTC.

register.twoFactorRequired: Two-factor authentication is required by the administrator.
register.addExtraSecurity: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
register.signInExisting: sign in to your existing account
register.delegateExistsTitle: This email already exists as a shared user.
register.delegateExistsBody: Someone has already invited {email} as a delegate on their account. Enter the delegate password you were given to join that access to this new account. If the password is wrong, no account will be created.
register.termsPrefix: By creating an account, you agree to our
register.delegatePasswordIncorrect: The delegate password is incorrect. Please try again.
register.createAccountFailed: Unable to create account. Please try again.

forgotPassword.intro: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with that email address, we have sent a password reset link. Please check your inbox.

resetPassword.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

changePassword.intro: Your password must be changed before you can continue.

setup2fa.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
setup2fa.intro: Two-factor authentication is required by the administrator before you can continue.

callback.pleaseWait: Please wait while we authenticate you

delegateGuard.noAccess: You don't have access to that section.

backupCodes.title: Save Your Backup Codes
backupCodes.intro: If you lose access to your authenticator app, you can use one of these codes to sign in. Each code can only be used once.
backupCodes.warning: Store these codes in a safe place. You will not be able to see them again. If you generate new codes, the previous ones will be invalidated.
backupCodes.savedConfirmation: I have saved these backup codes
backupCodes.fileEachOnce: Each code can only be used once.
backupCodes.fileStoreSafe: Store these codes in a safe place.

stepUp.unavailableBody: This action requires extra verification. Finish setting up your account password (or sign in with your identity provider) before accessing this setting.
stepUp.oidcBody: Sign in again with your identity provider to confirm it's you. You'll be brought right back here.
stepUp.totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
stepUp.passwordPrompt: Enter your current account password to continue.

twoFactorSetup.reenterPassword: Re-enter your current password to start two-factor authentication setup.
twoFactorSetup.title: Set Up Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorSetup.scanQr: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app (e.g., Google Authenticator, Authy).
twoFactorSetup.codeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

twoFactorVerify.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorVerify.backupPrompt: Enter one of your backup codes.
twoFactorVerify.totpPrompt: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactorVerify.rememberDevice: Don't ask again on this browser for 30 days
